_notes: Arbitrage fund — Drawdown Analysis shows NA for both 1Y and 3Y columns (no meaningful drawdown for arbitrage), so drawdown_pct is null. Composition has a negative Derivative leg (-0.41), which is real and expected. Mkt cap composition does not sum to 100 because most of the portfolio is non-equity (Debt + Cash + Derivative). full_holdings_count of 195 exceeds the 159 securities reported because individual securities appear in both Equity and Future-leg rows (intentional, not deduped per the model docstring). The 3-row delta from a prior 198 reflects chart-axis tokens (year labels at the bottom of the Detailed Portfolio page) being correctly filtered out by the alphabetic-content guard on security_name.
